summary: Added STA clipboard fallback to the Codex live proof helper, bumped DinoBrain to v2.2.7, pushed app tag/main, waited for GitHub Actions release, downloaded the official release ZIP, verified release manifest health, and reran verify:goal. The only remaining blocker is still the fresh real Codex Desktop UserPromptSubmit live proof after the latest server build.
decisions: Do not count stale live proof from before the latest server build.
Do not mark the full goal complete without real codex_desktop UserPromptSubmit evidence.
Keep direct stdio MCP proof separate from the required Desktop hook proof.
next_steps: Use a fresh Codex Desktop workspace thread and paste the pending live proof prompt.
Rerun npm run verify:goal after that prompt creates codex_preflight_completed evidence.
If the same blocker persists without fresh Desktop prompt evidence, the goal remains externally blocked.
